projectDescription: Your personal Jewish prayer toolkit — Zmanim and compass to Jerusalem calculated accurately based on your current location.
keyFeatures: Accurate daily zmanim (halachic prayer times) based on GPS or city search
Live countdown to the next upcoming zman
Jerusalem compass using device orientation sensor
Three built-in siddurim: Sephardic, Ashkenazi, and Chabad
Browser push-notification reminders for any zman
Hebrew calendar date, weekly Torah portion (Parsha), and Shabbat times
Customizable home dashboard with drag-and-drop reordering
Progressive Web App (PWA) — installable on mobile and desktop
publicApiSurface: Hebcal Zmanim API (https://www.hebcal.com/zmanim) — prayer times, Hebrew dates, Parsha
Sefaria API (https://www.sefaria.org/api) — siddur liturgical text content
